notes: The session-persistence feature (VAL-CROSS-003) was reviewed. All issues identified are non-blocking. The implementation successfully saves/restores workspace layout (id, name, cwd, git_branch, notification_count) to ~/.config/cmux/session.json. Known limitations (terminal history not persisted, fragile JSON parsing) were documented in the handoff.
